## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Simran to the team and provide context on workflows, client projects, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Simran joins GrowthX as a content manager, with Immubit as her first client project](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Mariana offers support for onboarding, emphasizing learning through practical work](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Weekly workflow: Monday updates, content assignment early week, 7-9 articles/week delivery](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [AI-assisted content creation with focus on quality, editing, and continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding and Tool Access

  - [Simran in day 2 of onboarding, awaiting access to tools](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Tool walkthrough scheduled for Friday](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Weis (W-E-I-E-S) handles access to all systems](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Bridget manages onboarding docs; Simran to ask her about ETD delivery and onboarding teams access](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

### Client Project: Immubit

  - [AI solution optimizing energy consumption in factory plants](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Niche keywords, less competition](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Kickoff meeting last week; strategy and first articles to be built together](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Mariana to share Notion doc with client info](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)

### Work Schedule and Communication

  - [Simran to add working hours to calendar](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Async communication encouraged; no expectation of immediate responses outside work hours](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Daily standup via Geekbot on Slack](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Content Creation Workflow

  - [Monday/Tuesday: Mariana assigns work for the week](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Content managers edit AI-generated content for quality and client-specific knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
  - [Goal: 7-9 articles/week for Immubit's editorial content workstream](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Emphasis on continuous improvement of AI outputs and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/RqB18VbwAZs-Jt2teyRQGAsYxFR9sz3T?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### AI and Content Management
